source.title: Formisano et al. — Effect of egg consumption on health outcomes: an updated umbrella review

position.quote: No evidence of association was found among all cardiovascular outcomes and all-cause mortality risk between high vs. low egg consumption.

factorWeights.factor: Judge eggs on biomarkers (LDL) vs hard CVD events
factorWeights.quote: The level of evidence was very weak for all the significant associations, including higher LDL cholesterol, while no association was found for cardiovascular outcomes.
The wide range of outcomes, with substantial variability and high heterogeneity, indicated a lack of robust evidence.
